articles.title: The AI Demand Dilemma: Utilities Confront Speculative Growth
articles.description: AI-driven data center growth is forcing utilities and regulators to rethink how the grid is planned, financed, and protected from speculative demand.

articles.title: Why this year’s World Cup ball may not fly as far
articles.description: Much is new about this month’s upcoming FIFA World Cup tournament, which will be held in the US, Canada, and Mexico. It hosts more teams than ever before. articles.title: Will the EU’s Data Center Efficiency Rules Undermine Its AI Ambitions?
articles.description: As the EU refines its strategies to compete with the US and China on chips, AI, and energy grids, data center groups warn that some proposals may prove counterproductive.
